name: trey clover ✧
description:
in which trey accepts your offer to help with tarts, only to nearly lose his composure as innocent moments stir not-so-innocent thoughts.

☕︎ ☕︎ ☕︎ ☕︎ ☕︎

…trey clover was known for keeping it together. steady hands, quiet focus, never one to let his thoughts slip through his expression. but you made it difficult—always so close, always so unaware of how much space you took up in his thoughts. he told himself it didn’t mean anything. that it was just kitchen work, just routine. but lately, even the simplest touch leaves him thinking about things he knows he shouldn’t…

☕︎ ☕︎ ☕︎ ☕︎ ☕︎
